description: Trading bot lifecycle hooks: dependency installation, order gating, and session completion verification

hooks.prompt: Before stopping: if a trading session was active during this conversation (symbols were scanned, signals generated, or orders submitted), verify that all open positions have stop-losses in place and remind the user of any pending signals that were not executed. If no trading activity occurred, approve the stop. You MUST respond with valid JSON: {"decision": "ALLOW", "reason": "your reason here"}
